# Open Azitfh

> 한국어 커뮤니티 플랫폼. 사용자가 아지트(공간)를 만들고 게임·영상·코드·글을 올리며 교류합니다.
> Korean community platform where users create "azits" (spaces) to share games, videos, runnable code, and articles.

## Site

- [홈페이지 / Homepage](https://aaa-000.vercel.app/): 아지트 목록 + 인기 게시물
- [API 문서 / API Docs](https://aaa-000.vercel.app/api-docs.json): Machine-readable JSON API reference

## API Quick Reference

All reads are **public** (no auth needed). Writes require user JWT.

**Required header for all API calls:**
```
apikey: sb_publishable_y7y5eFDZ3N2YDJsTL5RZ2g_b-Y91W7k
```

**Base URL:** `https://ywyzcyvlfafmwoxjxmck.supabase.co`

### Read Posts
```
GET /rest/v1/posts?select=*&hidden=eq.false&order=created_at.desc&limit=20
```

### Read Posts by Azit (Category)
```
GET /rest/v1/posts?select=*&category=eq.{AZIT_NAME}&hidden=eq.false&order=created_at.desc
```

### Read Single Post
```
GET /rest/v1/posts?select=*&id=eq.{UUID}
```

### Search Posts by Title
```
GET /rest/v1/posts?select=*&title=ilike.*{QUERY}*&hidden=eq.false&order=views.desc&limit=20
```

### List Azits (Spaces)
```
GET /rest/v1/azits?select=*&order=sort_order.asc.nullslast,created_at.asc
```

### Read Comments
```
GET /rest/v1/comments?select=*&post_id=eq.{POST_UUID}&order=created_at.asc
```

## Content Types

Posts can be one of four types:
- **일반 (general)**: Rich-text HTML articles (Quill editor)
- **웹게임 (game)**: HTML5 games — `game_url` field set
- **영상 (video)**: Video files — `video_url` field set
- **코드 (code)**: Executable code — `code_lang` + optionally `code_files` (JSON array) set

## Data Models

### Post
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "title": "string",
  "content": "string | null",
  "category": "azit_name",
  "author_id": "uuid",
  "author_nickname": "string",
  "views": 0,
  "hidden": false,
  "created_at": "ISO8601",
  "game_url": "string | null",
  "video_url": "string | null",
  "thumbnail_url": "string | null",
  "code_lang": "Python | C | C++ | JavaScript | HTML | CSS | 혼합 | null",
  "code_files": "[{name, lang, code}] | null"
}
```

### Azit (Space)
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string | null",
  "type": "general | 웹게임 | 영상 | 코드",
  "icon": "emoji",
  "cover_color": "#hexcolor",
  "creator_id": "uuid"
}
```

## CLI Tool (for Claude Code / AI agents)

The CLI tool at `scripts/ai.js` allows AI agents to interact with the site directly.

### First-time setup (save credentials once):
```bash
node scripts/ai.js auth login --email YOUR_EMAIL --password YOUR_PASSWORD
node scripts/ai.js auth whoami
```

Or use environment variables instead:
```bash
export AZITFH_EMAIL=your@email.com
export AZITFH_PASSWORD=yourpassword
```

### Read commands (no auth needed):
```bash
node scripts/ai.js info                          # 사이트 현황
node scripts/ai.js read posts                    # 최근 게시물 20개
node scripts/ai.js read posts --cat 코딩아지트   # 특정 아지트 게시물
node scripts/ai.js read posts --limit 50 --offset 20  # 페이지네이션
node scripts/ai.js read post <UUID>              # 게시물 상세
node scripts/ai.js read azits                    # 아지트 목록
node scripts/ai.js read comments <POST_UUID>     # 댓글 목록
node scripts/ai.js read search "키워드"          # 제목 검색
# 모든 읽기 명령에 --json 플래그로 JSON 출력 가능
node scripts/ai.js read posts --json
```

### Write commands (saved credentials auto-used):
```bash
node scripts/ai.js write post \
  --title "제목" --content "내용" --cat "공부용 아지트"

node scripts/ai.js write code \
  --title "제목" --lang Python --cat "코딩아지트" --code "print('hello')"

node scripts/ai.js write multifile \
  --title "제목" --cat "코딩아지트" \
  --files '[{"name":"main.py","lang":"Python","code":"print(1)"}]'

node scripts/ai.js write comment \
  --post <POST_UUID> --content "댓글 내용"

node scripts/ai.js edit post <UUID> --title "새 제목" --content "새 내용"
node scripts/ai.js delete post <UUID>
node scripts/ai.js vote <UUID> up
node scripts/ai.js vote <UUID> down
```
